description: Implement rotated hitbox/attack-box editing so selected boxes can be rotated with a dedicated handle while remaining rectangular. Update editor interaction, geometry representation, and serialization/runtime loading for both hit and attack boxes so rotation is preserved and editable.

make sure that when asset info ui and editors are open the user clicking the delete key will not delete the spawn group. the functionality to delete the spawn group should be avaliable when the asset is selected but not in asset info ui and editors stack. this way when the user is typing they can use the delete key without deleteing the spawn group of what they are editong
